description: PRED-105 cucumber-growth window closes today (Apr 18, 2026). On-site status still shows 'PENDING -- PROSPECTIVE' at poll time. The 14-day window opened 2026-04-04. Analyst must determine outcome when dome updates status (likely within 24-48h) and decide whether to add to data/uncounted-failures.json.
before: Registered: 2026-04-04 | Test window: April 18, 2026 (14-day window) -- PENDING -- PROSPECTIVE (as of 2026-04-17 poll)
after: Registered: 2026-04-04 | Test window: April 18, 2026 (14-day window) -- PENDING -- PROSPECTIVE (as of 2026-04-18T11:09 poll). Window expiry day reached; dome has not yet updated the status.
notes: PRED-105 claim: 46-degree copper coils around cucumber seedlings increase growth rate >=15% over 14 days vs. control. Falsification criterion: <5% growth difference. SHA256 hash 3c427a83edaeaf33c884264dedffbedece14378fc766bdffeeac0b4d4d517490 is present on-page. This is among the rare genuinely prospective predictions (registered 2026-04-04, deadline 2026-04-18). Poll Step 10 mandates HIGH priority on window expiry. Watch for: (a) dome updating status to PASS / refined / suspended / silently removed, (b) denominator changes to claimed accuracy, (c) any new WIN added coinciding with this closure.
